primaryServices.title: Small-business websites
primaryServices.audience: Service businesses, studios, and local brands that need a credible online home.
primaryServices.problem: Visitors cannot quickly understand what you do or how to contact you.
primaryServices.outcome: A clear, fast site that builds trust and turns visits into inquiries.

primaryServices.title: Website redesigns
primaryServices.audience: Businesses with an outdated site that no longer reflects their work.
primaryServices.problem: An old layout hurts credibility and makes updates painful.
primaryServices.outcome: A modern refresh with better structure, mobile experience, and room to grow.

primaryServices.title: Landing pages
primaryServices.audience: Campaigns, launches, and focused offers that need one strong page.
primaryServices.problem: A full website is more than you need, but a generic page will not convert.
primaryServices.outcome: A focused page with a clear message, CTA, and fast load time.

primaryServices.title: Ongoing optimization
primaryServices.audience: Sites that are live but need SEO, performance, and conversion improvements.
primaryServices.problem: Traffic arrives but leads stay flat without regular tuning.
primaryServices.outcome: Monthly improvements to visibility, clarity, and how visitors take action.

integrations.title: Contact forms
integrations.description: Reliable inquiry flows that reach your inbox without exposing API keys on the client.

integrations.title: Analytics
integrations.description: Understand what visitors do after they land—without drowning in dashboards.

integrations.title: Email integration
integrations.description: Connect newsletters or transactional email to the tools you already use.

integrations.title: CMS
integrations.description: An editing system that makes updates easier without limiting the design.

integrations.title: Booking functionality
integrations.description: Let customers request appointments or consultations from your site.

integrations.title: Custom dashboards
integrations.description: Simple admin views when your team needs more than a public website.

integrations.title: APIs
integrations.description: Connect your website to the tools your business already uses.

integrations.title: Authentication
integrations.description: Secure sign-in when members, staff, or clients need private areas.

integrations.title: Other custom features
integrations.description: Scoped additions discussed upfront—no surprise scope creep.

includedSection.title: What can be included in a website build?
includedSection.intro: Every project starts with a clear baseline. Advanced features are scoped separately so you know what is in the starter package and what is custom.
includes: Up to five core pages on the starter package
Contact form and basic on-page SEO setup
excludes: E-commerce, authentication, or complex booking systems
Large custom applications or advanced dashboards
Professional branding, photography, or ongoing copywriting
